response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK and Docker, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — aligning well with the core stack and responsibilities. His 6+ years of hands-on engineering, open-source contributions, and architectural versatility demonstrate maturity. Concerns include limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java in recent roles, and unclear depth in enterprise automation tooling context.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
Strong open-source contributions and DevOps/CI/CD infrastructure experience
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in recent roles
Kotlin/Java experience not clearly demonstrated in last 5 years
Limited evidence of enterprise internal tooling automation context
